description:
calibre is the one stop solution to all your e-book needs.

calibre is an e-book manager. It can view, convert, edit and catalog e-books in all of the major e-book formats. It can also talk to e-book reader devices. It can go out to the internet and fetch metadata for your books. It can download newspapers and convert them into e-books for convenient reading. It is cross platform, running on Linux, Windows and macOS.
New features
- Content server: In the /mobile view allow clicking on book titles/covers to see book details
- Edit book: Allow reset of zoom to 100% by right clicking in the preview panel
- macOS Tahoe: Have the calibre app icon automatically use a dark look when the system is in dark mode
- AI: Support for arbitrary local providers that export an OpenAI compatible interface
Bug fixes
- Native TTS engine: Normalize text to NFKC so that word tracking works when the native engine reports spoken word with different normal form
- When converting GIF images to PNG workaround bug in PIL causing exception when checking if the GIF is animated
  Closes tickets: 2148533
- Preserve existing conversation with AI when there is an error talking to it
Improved news sources
- Hacker News
- The Atlantic
- Scientific American
- Mediapart
- Hindu
